summary: Fleet GPS Backend API testing complete. All 30 tests passed. All 12 GPS endpoints working correctly with proper authentication (X-GPS-API-Key for webhooks, Bearer token for other endpoints). Data persistence verified in MongoDB.

backend_tests.test_webhook_multiple_positions: PASS - Handles multiple positions in single request
backend_tests.test_webhook_empty_positions: PASS - Returns received=0 for empty array
backend_tests.test_batch_webhook_accepts_valid_key: PASS - Stores positions for multiple devices
backend_tests.test_create_device: PASS - Creates device with IMEI, vehicleName, etc.
backend_tests.test_list_devices: PASS - Returns devices array with count
backend_tests.test_delete_device: PASS - Deletes device and verifies removal
backend_tests.test_get_all_positions: PASS - Returns positions array with count
backend_tests.test_get_device_position: PASS - Returns device and position data
backend_tests.test_get_device_history: PASS - Returns history array with period
backend_tests.test_get_stats: PASS - Returns devices, online, offline, totalPositions
backend_tests.test_get_webhook_info: PASS - Returns webhookUrl, apiKeyMasked, format examples

verified_features: POST /api/fleet/gps/webhook - Receives GPS data from VPS (X-GPS-API-Key auth), rejects invalid/missing keys with 403
POST /api/fleet/gps/webhook/batch - Receives batch GPS data for multiple devices
POST /api/fleet/gps/devices - Registers GPS device (Bearer token auth), rejects duplicate IMEI with 409
GET /api/fleet/gps/devices - Lists all registered devices with lastPosition enrichment
GET /api/fleet/gps/positions - Gets latest positions for all company devices
GET /api/fleet/gps/positions/{imei} - Gets latest position for specific device
GET /api/fleet/gps/history/{imei}?start=...&end=... - Gets position history within date range
GET /api/fleet/gps/stats - Gets GPS system stats (device count, online/offline, total positions)
GET /api/fleet/gps/webhook-info - Gets webhook setup info (URL, masked key, format examples)
GET /api/fleet/gps/stream - SSE stream endpoint for real-time updates
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper Pydantic models for validation
Webhook endpoints correctly use X-GPS-API-Key header authentication
Device CRUD endpoints correctly use Bearer token authentication
MongoDB indexes created on startup for gps_devices, gps_positions, gps_history
30-day TTL index on gps_history.receivedAt for automatic cleanup
Proper error handling with 403/404/409 status codes
seed_data_creation: Test devices created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Fleet GPS Backend fully tested. All 12 endpoints working correctly. Webhook uses X-GPS-API-Key header (not Bearer token). Other endpoints use Bearer token from fleet auth. MongoDB collections: gps_devices (IMEI registry), gps_positions (latest position per IMEI), gps_history (all positions with 30-day TTL). Use test credentials: Nandetiri1@gmail.com / 12345678. GPS webhook key: 3iIYkCw2PAWGzDtmv6RAsfRpejFUu0n_4shfkQb-XSg

mocked_api.note: All endpoints use real MongoDB. No mocking.
